Part.Source:
//in:,in:&CarCreDtaVct,in:&CarPlanCod,,in:&CreCarArqc,in:&CreCarNroAut
Do 'UltimoCodigo' Do 'ConfigVale'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal If &OqueFazer = 'ADD' &CreDupNro = trim(str(PedCod))
RetornaTotalNota.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &NfeNum, &TotalNota)
if &NfeNum <> 0 &CreDupNro = trim(str(&NfeNum)) EndIF
&PedDtaFat = &sdtPgto.PedDtaFat PedTmpDupDtaFat = &PedDtaFat &PedCliCbrCod = PedCliCbrCod
Do CAse CAse &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA if &sdtPgto.OpcaoFechamento = 'U' do 'addDuplicataUnica' Else //&OpcaoFechamento = 'B' // é montado antes entao aqui nao precisa.
if not PedDtaPrv.IsEmpty() and not PedDtaPrv.IsNull() and Not PedDtaRetCon.IsEmpty() and not PedDtaRetCon.IsNull() &sdtVencimentosItem = new() &sdtVencimentosItem.CreDtaVct = PedDtaPrv &sdtVencimentos.Add(&sdtVencimentosItem) Else if PedPraTipParc = '1' RetornaVencimentosParcelasDias.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &PedPraParNom, &DscPar, &sdtVencimentos) Else &PedPraParNom = PedPraParNom RetornaVencimentosParcela.Call(EmpCod, PedCliCidCod, &PedPraParNom,ReceberPagar.Receber, &PedDtaFat, &sdtVencimentos, &DscPar) Endif Endif
For &sdtVencimentosItem in &sdtVencimentos &Parcela += 1 &CreDtaVct(&Parcela) = &sdtVencimentosItem.CreDtaVct EndFor
&CreVlrDup = round((&sdtPgto.CreVlrDup / &Parcela),2) &ResCreVlrDup = round(&sdtPgto.CreVlrDup,2) - (round((&sdtPgto.CreVlrDup / &Parcela),2) * &Parcela)
do 'addDuplicata' EndIf CAse &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO or &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX or &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO do 'AddDinheiro'
CAse &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD or &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC Do 'DadosCartao'
CAse &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET do 'AddCheque' EndCase
Else //ALTERA DP PEDIDO
&Parcela = 0 If PedDtaFat.IsEmpty() &PedDtaFat = PedTmpDupDtaFat Else &PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat EndIF
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Where CreSts <> Status_DUplicata.CANCELADA Do 'UltimoCodigo'
&Parcela += 1 new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod PedTmpCreCod = CreCod
PedTmpDupNro = CreDupNro PedTmpDupVlr = CreVlrDup PedTmpDupVct = CreDtaVct
PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = CreFrpPgtoCod
PedTmpSem = substr(cdow(CreDtaVct), 1, 3)
PedTmpPrz = 0 IF (not CreDtaVct.IsEmpty()) and (not &PedDtaFat.IsEmpty()) PedTmpPrz = (CreDtaVct - &PedDtaFat) EndIf
PedTmpDupCbrCod = CreCbrCod
if CrePlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif
RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = CrePlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod PedTmpCreCliCod = CreCliCod
//ValeFuncionario if &ValePlanCod = PedTmpPlanCod and CreFunCodVal > 0 PedTmpPesCod = CreFunCodVal Else PedTmpPesCod = 0 //evitar gravar qnd nao for PgtoComVale Endif
If CreVlrDup <> CreVlrSdo PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Sim Else PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao EndIF
PedTmpDupCarNroAut = CreCarNroAut
Do CAse Case (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO) and CreVlrSdo <> CreVlrDup &CreCod = CreCod do 'GetDadosConta' PedTmpDtaPag = &AuxCrePagDta PedTmpCtaBanCod = &CtaBanCod
Case CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD
PedTmpDupBanCarCod = CreCarBanCod PedTmpDupCreDeb = CreCarCreDeb EndCase
//CHEQUE &CreCheCod = CreCheCod if &CreCheCod > 0 do 'loadCheque' PedTmpDtaEms = &CreDtaEms PedTmpDupNro = trim(str(&CheNro)) PedTmpBanCod = &CheBanCod PedTmpAgeCod = &CheAgeCod PedTmpConCod = &CheCon PedTmpTitNom = &CheTitNom PedTmpTitCpf = &CheTitCpf PedTmpTitRg = &CheTitRg PedTmpTitFon = &CheTel PedTmpObs = &CheObs Endif
//FIM CHEQUE
EndNEw EndFor EndIF EndFor
commit
sub 'GetDadosConta' &AuxCrePagDta.SetEmpty() &CtaBanCod.SetEmpty() &CreMovCod.SetEmpty()
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CrePagCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CreCod = &CreCod &AuxCrePagDta = CrePagDta &CreMovCod = CreMovCod do 'GetMovimento' Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'GetMovimento' For Each Order EmpCod, MovCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where MovCod = &CreMovCod &CtaBanCod = MovCtaBanCod Exit EndFor
EndSub
sub 'LoadCheque' &CreDtaEms.SetEmpty() &CheBanCod.SetEmpty() &CheAgeCod.SetEmpty() &CheCon.SetEmpty() &CheTitNom.SetEmpty() &CheTitCpf.SetEmpty() &CheTitRg.SetEmpty() &CheTel.SetEmpty() &CheObs.SetEmpty() &CheNro.SetEmpty()
For Each Order EmpCod, CheCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CheCod = &CreCheCod &CheNro = CheNro &CheBanCod = CheBanCod &CheAgeCod = CheAgeCod &CheCon = CheCon &CheTitNom = CheTitNom &CheTitCpf = CheTitCpf &CheTitRg = CheTitRg &CheTel = CheTel &CheObs = CheObs &CreDtaEms = CheDtaEmi Exit EndFor EndSub
sub 'addCheque'
Do 'UltimoCodigo'
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &pedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod
PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoCod
PedTmpDtaEms = &sdtPgto.CreDtaEms PedTmpCreCod = 0
PedTmpDupNro = trim(str(&sdtPgto.CheNro)) PedTmpDupVct = &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct
//&PedTmpSem = substr(cdow(&CheDtaVct), 1, 3) PedTmpSem = &sdtPgto.CheMot.ToString() // &PedTmpSem //USAR PARA O MOTIVO PADRAO
PedTmpPrz = 0 IF (not &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct.IsEmpty()) and (not &sdtPgto.CreDtaEms.IsEmpty()) PedTmpPrz = (&sdtPgto.CreDtaVct - &sdtPgto.CreDtaEms) EndIf
PedTmpDupVlr = &sdtPgto.creVlrDup
PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1
//PedTmpDtaPag if &sdtPgto.PlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif
RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = &sdtPgto.PlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod
PedTmpCreCliCod = &sdtPgto.PedTmpCreCliCod PedTmpBanCod = &sdtPgto.CheBanCod PedTmpAgeCod = &sdtPgto.CheAgeCod PedTmpConCod = &sdtPgto.CheCon
PedTmpTitNom = &sdtPgto.CheTitNom PedTmpTitCpf = &sdtPgto.CheTitCpf PedTmpTitRg = &sdtPgto.CheTitRg PedTmpTitFon = &sdtPgto.CheTel PedTmpObs = &sdtPgto.CheObs
PedTmpCtaBanCod = &sdtPgto.CtaBanCod
PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao
//VALE FUNCIONARIO if &ValePlanCod = &PlanCod and &sdtPgto.FunPesCod > 0 PedTmpPesCod = &sdtPgto.FunPesCod Else PedTmpPesCod = 0 //evitar gravar qnd nao for PgtoComVale Endif EndNew EndSub
sub 'addDinheiro'
Do 'UltimoCodigo'
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod PedTmpCreCod = 0
PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoCod
If &sdtPgto.CreDupNro.IndexOf('CREDITO',1) > 0 &AuxCreDupNro = &sdtPgto.CreDupNro PedTmpDupNro = &sdtPgto.CreDupNro Else &AuxCreDupNro = trim(str(&PedCod)) +'-'+ltrim(str(&PedTmpDupCod)) PedTmpDupNro = &AuxCreDupNro EndIf
PedTmpDupVlr = &sdtPgto.creVlrDup PedTmpCtaBanCod = &sdtPgto.CtaBanCod
if &sdtPgto.PlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = &sdtPgto.PlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod
PedTmpCreCliCod = &sdtPgto.PedTmpCreCliCod
//VALE FUNCIONARIO if &ValePlanCod = &PlanCod and &sdtPgto.FunPesCod > 0 PedTmpPesCod = &sdtPgto.FunPesCod Else PedTmpPesCod = 0 //evitar gravar qnd nao for PgtoComVale Endif
if &sdtPgto.IsPago = true PedTmpDtaPag = &sdtPgto.CrePagDta Endif
PedTmpDupVct = &sdtPgto.CrePagDta
if &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO or &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.PIX PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1 //JDF, dinheiro eh dinheiro nao precisa Local Else if &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod <> 0 //JDF, dinheiro eh dinheiro nao precisa Local PedTmpDupCbrCod = &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod Else PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1 Endif Endif
PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew EndSub
Sub 'UltimoCodigo' &PedTmpDupCod = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, (PedTmpDupCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &PedTmpDupCod = PedTmpDupCod Exit EndFor &PedTmpDupCod += 1 EndSub
sub 'addDuplicataUNICA'
&ParMax = &Parcela &Parcela = 1
Do 'UltimoCodigo'
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod
PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoCod
if &sdtPgto.CreDupNro.IsEmpty() PedTmpDupNro = trim(&CreDupNro) +'-'+ltrim(str(&PedTmpDupCod)) Else PedTmpDupNro = trim(&sdtPgto.CreDupNro) Endif
PedTmpDupVlr = &sdtPgto.CreVlrDup PedTmpDupVct = &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct
PedTmpSem = substr(cdow(&sdtPgto.CreDtaVct), 1, 3) PedTmpPrz = (&sdtPgto.CreDtaVct - &PedDtaFat)
do Case Case &sdtPgto.creCbrCod <> 0 PedTmpDupCbrCod = &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod Case &PedCliCbrCod = 0 PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1 Otherwise PedTmpDupCbrCod = &PedCliCbrCod EndCase
if &sdtPgto.PlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif
RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = &sdtPgto.PlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod PedTmpCreCliCod = &sdtPgto.PedTmpCreCliCod
if &ValePlanCod = &PlanCod and &sdtPgto.FunPesCod > 0 //ValeFuncionario PedTmpPesCod = &sdtPgto.FunPesCod Else PedTmpPesCod = 0 //evitar gravar qnd nao for PgtoComVale Endif
PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew
&PedTmpDupCod += 1 &Parcela += 1 EndSub
sub 'addDuplicata'
&ParMax = &Parcela &Parcela = 1
Do 'UltimoCodigo'
Do while &Parcela <= &ParMax New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod
PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoCod
&AuxCreDupNro = trim(&CreDupNro) +'-'+ltrim(str(&PedTmpDupCod)) PedTmpDupNro = trim(&AuxCreDupNro)
if &Parcela = 1 PedTmpDupVlr = (&CreVlrDup + &ResCreVlrDup) else PedTmpDupVlr = &CreVlrDup endif
PedTmpDupVct = &CreDtaVct(&Parcela)
PedTmpSem = substr(cdow(&CreDtaVct(&Parcela)), 1, 3) PedTmpPrz = (&CreDtaVct(&Parcela) - &PedDtaFat)
do Case Case &sdtPgto.creCbrCod <> 0 PedTmpDupCbrCod = &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod Case &PedCliCbrCod = 0 PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1 Otherwise PedTmpDupCbrCod = &PedCliCbrCod EndCase
if &sdtPgto.PlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif
RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = &sdtPgto.PlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod PedTmpCreCliCod = &sdtPgto.PedTmpCreCliCod
if &ValePlanCod = &PlanCod and &sdtPgto.FunPesCod > 0 //ValeFuncionario PedTmpPesCod = &sdtPgto.FunPesCod Else PedTmpPesCod = 0 //evitar gravar qnd nao for PgtoComVale Endif
PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew
&PedTmpDupCod += 1 &Parcela += 1 EndDo EndSub
Sub 'DadosCartao' For each order EmpCod,BanCarCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where BanCarCod = &sdtPgto.BanCarCod
Do Case Case &sdtPgto.CarForPag = 2 and &sdtPgto.CarParQtd > 1 // Crédito Parcelado &BanCarDiaCrePraPri = BanCarDiaCrePraPri &BanCarDiaCrePraDms = BanCarDiaCrePraDms
//PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA &Taxa = 0 if not &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.IsEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, BanCarCod, BanItemNom, BanItemCredDeb, (BanItemPar) Where BanItemNom.ToUpper() = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.ToUpper() Where BanItemCredDeb = 'C' Where BanItemPar <= &sdtPgto.CarParQtd
&Taxa = BanItemTax Exit EndFor //PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA Endif
//CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO if &Taxa.IsEmpty() For each order EmpCod,BanCarCod,BanCarCrePar //PEGA COMO PADRAO Where BanCarCrePar = &sdtPgto.CarParQtd &BanCarVlrMinPar = BanCarVlrMinPar &BanCarVlrJurPar = 0 if BanCarVlrJurPar > 0 &BanCarVlrJurPar = (BanCarVlrJurPar / 100) EndIf
&Taxa = BanCarPerCrePra Exit EndFor Endif //CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO
&montante = &sdtPgto.CreVlrDup + (&sdtPgto.CreVlrDup * &BanCarVlrJurPar) //&PedTmpDupCarJur = 0 &PrimeiraParcelaSemJuros = round(&sdtPgto.CreVlrDup / &sdtPgto.CarParQtd,2) &PrimeiraParcela = round(&montante / &sdtPgto.CarParQtd,2) //-33,33
&resto = &sdtPgto.CreVlrDup - (&PrimeiraParcelaSemJuros * &sdtPgto.CarParQtd) &DemaisParcelasSemJuros = &PrimeiraParcelaSemJuros &PrimeiraParcelaSemJuros += &resto
&resto = &montante - (&PrimeiraParcela * &sdtPgto.CarParQtd) &DemaisParcelas = &PrimeiraParcela &PrimeiraParcela += &resto
&PedTmpDupCarJur = &PrimeiraParcela - &PrimeiraParcelaSemJuros
&CreVlrDup = &PrimeiraParcela //valor da primeira parcela para gravar &AuxCreDtaVct = &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct + BanCarDiaCrePraPri //Primeiro Vcto parcela para gravar If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 7 &AuxCreDtaVct += 2 Else If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 1 &AuxCreDtaVct += 1 EndIF EndIf
// &CreCarBanNom = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom
&AuxPar = 1 Do 'AddCartao'
&AuxPar+=1
Do While &AuxPar <= &sdtPgto.CarParQtd &PedTmpDupCarJur = (&DemaisParcelas - &DemaisParcelasSemJuros) &CreVlrDup = &DemaisParcelas &AuxCreDtaVct += &BanCarDiaCrePraDms If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 7 &AuxCreDtaVct += 2 Else If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 1 &AuxCreDtaVct += 1 EndIF EndIf &AuxPar+=1
Do 'AddCartao' EndDo
Case &sdtPgto.CarForPag = 2 and &sdtPgto.CarParQtd <= 1 //Crédito a Vista
//PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA &Taxa = 0 if not &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.IsEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, BanCarCod, BanItemNom, BanItemCredDeb, BanItemPar Where BanItemNom.ToUpper() = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.ToUpper() Where BanItemCredDeb = 'C' Where BanItemPar = &sdtPgto.CarParQtd
&Taxa = BanItemTax Exit EndFor //PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA Endif
//CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO if &Taxa.IsEmpty() &Taxa = BanCarPerCreVis Endif //CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO
&AuxCreDtaVct = &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct + BanCarDiaCreVis &CreVlrDup = &sdtPgto.CreVlrDup // &CreCarBanNom = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom
If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 7 &AuxCreDtaVct += 2 Else If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 1 &AuxCreDtaVct += 1 EndIF EndIf Do 'AddCartao'
Case &sdtPgto.CarForPag = 1 // Débito
//PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA &Taxa = 0 if not &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.IsEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, BanCarCod, BanItemNom, BanItemCredDeb Where BanItemNom.ToUpper() = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom.ToUpper() Where BanItemCredDeb = 'D' //Where BanItemPar <= &sdtPgto.CarParQtd
&Taxa = BanItemTax Exit EndFor //PEGA DA FORMA NOVA DA BANDEIRA CADASTRADA NA ADQUIRENCIA Endif
//CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO if &Taxa.IsEmpty() &Taxa = BanCarPerDeb Endif //CASO NAO TENHA PEGA DA FORMA PADRAO
&AuxCreDtaVct = &sdtPgto.CreDtaVct + BanCarDiaDeb &CreVlrDup = &sdtPgto.CreVlrDup // &CreCarBanNom = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 7 &AuxCreDtaVct += 2 Else If DoW(&AuxCreDtaVct) = 1 &AuxCreDtaVct += 1 EndIF EndIf Do 'AddCartao' EndCase Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'AddCartao' &ParcelaCartao += 1 Do 'UltimoCodigo'
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedTmpDupCod = &PedTmpDupCod
PedTmpCreCod = 0 PedTmpFrpPgtoCod = &sdtPgto.FrpPgtoCod
&AuxCreDupNro = trim(&CreDupNro) +'-'+ltrim(str(&PedTmpDupCod)) PedTmpDupNro = trim(&AuxCreDupNro) PedTmpDupVlr = &CreVlrDup PedTmpDupVct = &AuxCreDtaVct PedTmpDupCarJur = &PedTmpDupCarJur PedTmpDupCarDes = &PedTmpDupCarDes
PedTmpSem = substr(cdow(&AuxCreDtaVct), 1, 3)
PedTmpPrz = (&AuxCreDtaVct - &CarCreDtaVct) PedTmpDupTxa = &Taxa PedTmpDupBanCarCod = &sdtPgto.BanCarCod PedTmpDupCreDeb = &sdtPgto.CarForPag
if &sdtPgto.PlanCod.IsEmpty() if &LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Else RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon027_PlanoContasFornecedor, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) Endif
RetornaCodigoPlanoCOntas.Call(&EmpCod, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &PlanCod) Else &PlanCod = &sdtPgto.PlanCod EndiF PedTmpPlanCod = &PlanCod PedTmpCreCliCod = &sdtPGto.PedTmpCreCliCod PedTmpDupCarArqc = trim(str(&ParcelaCartao)) PedTmpDupCarNroAut = &sdtPgto.CreCarNroAut
PedTmpTitNom = &sdtPgto.CreCarBanNom
// do Case // Case &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod <> 0 //JDF CARTAO NAO PODE ISSO, FIXA O LOCAL COBRANCA // PedTmpDupCbrCod = &sdtPgto.CreCbrCod // Case &PedCliCbrCod = 0 PedTmpDupCbrCod = 1 // Otherwise //JDF CARTAO NAO PODE ISSO // PedTmpDupCbrCod = &PedCliCbrCod // EndCase
PedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew
Commit EndSub
Sub 'ConfigVale' RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon063_PgtoComVale, &ValeCfgVlr) &ValePlanHie = trim(&ValeCfgVlr) &ValePlanCod.SetEmpty() RetornaCodigoPlanoContas.Call(&EmpCod, &ValePlanHie, &ValePlanCod) EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Bandeira Dias Crédito Parcelado primeira Parcela

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Bandeira Dias Crédito Parcelado Demais Parcelas
